The '''Rise of the Cortosis Battle Droids''' was a campaign that occurred when the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] began to manufacture [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] with [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]], a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]-resistant substance. The event ended with the destruction of the [[C-B3 cortosis battle droid/Legends|C-B3 cortosis battle droid]] factory on [[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]].

A number of missions and skirmishes were involved in this campaign, including a [[Mission to Tatooine (Anakin Skywalker)|Mission to Tatooine]], the [[Coruscant Insurrection]], a [[Duel in Bentho's Nightclub]] and a [[Mission to Metalorn (Clone Wars)|mission]] to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]].

{{Battle-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
While ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' originally dated ''[[Star Wars: The New Droid Army]]'' to ten months after the start of the Clone Wars, "[[Heroes on Both Sides]]," which is set in 20 BBY, later established that the planet Coruscant had not been attacked until the events of that episode, moving ''The New Droid Army'' forward in the timeline.
